_comment: Persistent human curation decisions for the publications list. scripts/curate.py reads this so re-running the pipeline never requires re-doing the manual review. Edit this file to change decisions.

excluded_ids.title: Total protein determination in pigeon plasma and serum: comparison of refractometric methods with the biuret method
excluded_ids.reason: Name collision - different Brendan MacLean (veterinary/biochemistry, 1996). Confirmed not his.

excluded_ids.title: Stratigraphic interpretation of the central Grand Banks from high-resolution seismic reflection profiles
excluded_ids.reason: Name collision - different Brendan MacLean (geology, 1975). Confirmed not his.

preprint_policy.description: Keep a preprint only if it has NO corresponding published (non-preprint) paper. Matching is by normalized title. Preprints with a published counterpart are dropped so the paper is counted once (the published version is kept).
